title: Architecture Boundary Parent Validation
goal: Validate and close parent issue #409 by proving all child architecture-boundary risks have owner boundaries and proof stories.
non_goals: Do not add new architecture capability.
Do not reopen child implementations unless validation reveals a concrete gap.
Do not treat child issue closure alone as parent intent satisfaction.

intent.outcome: Parent #409 has explicit checked-in validation evidence mapping each requested architecture risk to child proof.
intent.constraints: Validation-only milestone unless a child acceptance gap is found.
intent.latitude: Use live GitHub state plus checked-in package evidence and comments as the parent proof story.
intent.escalation: Escalate or create follow-up issues if any child risk lacks proof or owner boundary.

execution.proof: Check live child issue states, run package summary/reconcile/doctor, and record parent closeout.

invariants: Child closure alone is not parent validation.
Each architecture risk maps to a proof story and owner boundary.
Remaining follow-up work must become explicit rather than hidden in parent closure.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Strengthen architectural boundaries without adding broad new capability.
intent_continuity.this slice completes the larger intended: yes if all child proofs map to parent acceptance

required_continuation.activation trigger: Create follow-up only if validation finds missing proof.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Parent #409 now has an explicit evidence map from each architecture risk to a closed child issue, owner boundary, and proof story.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: None expected for #409 if validation passes.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Package summary still reports older historical audit candidates, but the current architecture-boundary lane no longer has an implementation gap after #410 and #411 closeout plus #412-#414 validation comments.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: Move to the next roadmap lane after #409 closes.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Ingest and implement all issues lane by lane. Commit and push after each milestone. Collect dogfooding evidence.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Close the architecture-boundary parent only after validating child evidence, not as a side effect of child issue closure.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Parent validation record with child evidence map.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm child issue state and proof mapping satisfy every parent acceptance bullet.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: planning evidence surfaces only unless validation discovers a real implementation gap
execution_bounds.required validation commands: gh issue views for #409-#418, summary, reconcile, doctor, proof selector
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Any implementation change beyond parent closeout evidence.

context_budget.live working set: issue #409, child issue states #410-#418, #410/#411 archives, #412-#414 validation comments
context_budget.recoverable later: GitHub issue comments and archived child plans
context_budget.externalize before shift: Keep this plan updated with the parent evidence map.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Any child proof gap requiring implementation follow-up.

references.label: Strengthen architecture boundaries after contract and generated-layer expansion

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not close parent solely because children are closed; prove acceptance mapping.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Whether existing child evidence is sufficient.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Any parent acceptance bullet lacks a proof story.

active_milestone.scope: Parent validation and closeout evidence only.

immediate_next_action: Validate #409 against child issue proof stories.
invariants: Child closure alone is not parent validation.
Each architecture risk maps to a proof story and owner boundary.
Remaining follow-up work must become explicit rather than hidden in parent closure.
validation_commands: gh issue view 410 --json number,title,state,url; gh issue view 411 --json number,title,state,url; gh issue view 412 --json number,title,state,url; gh issue view 413 --json number,title,state,url; gh issue view 414 --json number,title,state,url; gh issue view 415 --json number,title,state,url; gh issue view 416 --json number,title,state,url; gh issue view 417 --json number,title,state,url; gh issue view 418 --json number,title,state,url
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Child issues cover the remaining architecture-structure risks.
Each child issue has a clear owner boundary and proof story.
Future changes can preserve architecture discipline without broad rereading.

parent_acceptance_map.risk: root cli.py interface authority keeps shrinking
parent_acceptance_map.owner_boundary: python_runtime_boundary contract owns root_cli_authority_audit; cli.py only projects contract-owned data.
parent_acceptance_map.proof_story: archive/root-cli-interface-authority-audit.plan.json; defaults root_cli_authority output; contract tooling check; tests.

parent_acceptance_map.risk: source -> packaged payload -> installed root synchronization is easier to prove
parent_acceptance_map.owner_boundary: scripts/check/check_source_payload_operational_install.py owns sync proof; package pyprojects and bootstrap dirs remain package owned; root .agentic-workspace is operational.
product_managed_enclave report/contract tooling owns boundary leak and quietness checks.
parent_acceptance_map.proof_story: issue comment reports product_managed_enclave status clean, startup_quietness compact, local-only state non-authoritative, boundary_leaks empty.

parent_acceptance_map.risk: review artifacts stay historical and out of ordinary startup
parent_acceptance_map.owner_boundary: closeout_trust report and contract tooling own review-artifact routing.
parent_acceptance_map.proof_story: issue comment reports closeout_trust classifies reviews as evidence-only and contract tooling blocks startup routing to review dirs.

parent_acceptance_map.owner_boundary: effective_authority defaults and contract tooling own owner_choice_review.
parent_acceptance_map.proof_story: issue comment reports owner_choice_review covers config policy, contract/schema authority, planning active state, Memory, review evidence, generated output, package payload, and runtime primitives.

parent_acceptance_map.risk: documentation and stale installed surfaces do not undermine architecture boundary
parent_acceptance_map.owner_boundary: documentation role map and stale installed-surface checks own docs structure under the docs child lane.
parent_acceptance_map.proof_story: live child issue states #415-#418 are closed; parent #409 listed docs/stale-surface references and these children cover them.

execution_run.handoff source: uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; gh issue view 409 --json number,title,body,state,labels,url,comments
execution_run.what happened: Validated parent #409 against child evidence for #410-#414 plus docs/stale-surface lane #415-#418.
execution_run.scope touched: planning state, external intent evidence, and parent validation execplan
execution_run.validations run: gh issue views for #409-#418; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/external-intent-evidence.json .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/architecture-boundary-parent-validation.plan.json --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: #409 is satisfied; next work is owned by the roadmap rather than this parent archive.
execution_run.next step: Archive parent validation, commit and push, close #409.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; validation-only, no runtime or payload changes
finished_run_review.config compliance: used checked-in planning, live issue state, proof, reconcile, and doctor
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; parent closure is based on explicit risk-to-child proof mapping, not child closure alone
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: move to the next roadmap lane after commit/push.

proof_report.validation proof: Live GitHub shows #410-#418 closed; #410 and #411 have checked-in archives from this run; #412-#414 have post-close intent-validation comments; proof selected planning surfaces; reconcile clean; doctor healthy.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: `gh issue view 410-418` states are CLOSED; `uv run agentic-workspace proof ...` selected planning_surfaces; `uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json` status clean; `uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json` health healthy.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Ingest and implement all issues lane by lane. Commit and push after each milestone. Collect dogfooding evidence.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: All #409 architecture risks map to closed child evidence with owner boundaries and proof stories; #410-#418 are closed live.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve architecture discipline through explicit ownership and proof rather than broad manual rereading.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Validation record only; no new capability unless evidence reveals a gap.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can the architecture-boundary lane close without hidden follow-on?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: Parent #409 acceptance is satisfied after explicit child proof mapping.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: parent_acceptance_map; #410/#411 archives; #412-#414 validation comments; live child issue states; proof/reconcile/doctor.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen or create follow-up if a future architecture change lacks owner boundary, proof route, source/payload/root sync proof, root CLI authority classification, enclave quietness/removability, review artifact historical routing, or one-owner-per-concern validation.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Parent #409 architecture-boundary lane validated and ready to close.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Live issue state, checked-in child archives, issue validation comments, proof, reconcile, and doctor all support closure.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Parent acceptance map is kept in this archive.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): No new durable surface needed; child checks and contracts remain the durable owners.

discard.summary: Raw full GitHub issue JSON beyond child state and proof comments.

continuation.summary: Proceed to the next roadmap lane.

config_check.summary: No new durable surface needed; child checks and contracts remain the durable owners.

drift_log: 2026-04-27: Promoted parent #409 validation after #410 and #411 closed.
